title: PipeShare BASE file explorer scope fix
description:
The file explorer on pipeshare.live could load an empty tree even though Wasabi has thousands of files under portal-users/job 8.

Root cause: stale ?clientId=tenant-* URL params and admin URL scope overriding the signed-in portal-users/8 assignment. The API returned HTTP 200 with zero files for tenant-mike-strickland/1 while portal-users/8 returns 4581 files. Empty trees were also cached in sessionStorage.

Frontend now prefers session scope on private BASE, strips stale tenant URL params at boot, retries with assigned scope when the first tree is empty, and skips caching empty trees.

Who is affected: PipeShare BASE on the private OVH server (pipeshare.live). SaaS when the next platform version is applied in cPanel releases.
changeLog: Prefer session portal-users/job scope over stale tenant URL params on BASE.
Strip tenant ?clientId= from the URL when session is portal-users.
Retry file tree fetch with assigned scope when the first response is empty.
Do not cache empty file trees in sessionStorage (avoids 5-minute blank explorer).
